meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to accelerate your development workflow as a professional freelancer.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates debugging friction by enforcing strict architecture patterns and automated error handling. By integrating Claude Code, you offload the cognitive load of stack traces to an AI agent, allowing you to resolve complex logic errors in seconds while maintaining a clean, production-ready codebase for your clients.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and your terminal is glowing red with an error message that refuses to yield. We have all been there—staring at a stack trace that feels like a labyrinth, burning billable hours on a bug that should have taken five minutes to fix. It is the silent killer of freelance profitability.

But what if you could change the game? The Antigravity project template isn't just a boilerplate; it is an architectural safeguard. By combining this robust foundation with the analytical power of Claude Code, you transform from a developer fighting syntax into an architect orchestrating high-performance SaaS solutions.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a standardized project structure that prevents common runtime errors before they happen.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity template with strict TypeScript configuration and integrated error boundaries.

steps.title: Configure Intelligent Error Boundaries
steps.description: Set up automated catch-blocks that provide actionable context to the AI for faster resolution.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement global error logging and custom exception classes that adhere to the Antigravity pattern.

steps.title: Streamline Debugging with Claude Code
steps.description: Feed specific stack traces directly into the AI context for immediate root-cause analysis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current stack trace and identify the exact line of code violating our state management policy.

steps.title: Validate Logic with Unit Tests
steps.description: Ensure your fixes are durable by generating automated tests that confirm the bug will not reappear.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test cases for the fixed function to ensure edge-case coverage.

steps.title: Deploy with Confidence
steps.description: Finalize your build using the Antigravity deployment pipeline to ensure zero-downtime releases.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the pre-flight check and verify deployment readiness for the production environment.

pro_tips: Always use the --verbose flag in Claude Code when debugging cryptic memory leaks to see the AI's internal reasoning chain.
Map your Antigravity error codes to specific documentation sections to automate client support tickets.
Keep your context window clean by deleting temporary test files after each successful debug cycle.
Use 'claude architect' mode to refactor your entire codebase structure if you encounter recurring logic errors in the same module.
Leverage Antigravity's 'ghost-mode' in local dev to simulate production API latency during debugging sessions.
content.next_steps: Once your first module is stabilized, begin migrating your existing client projects to the Antigravity structure to minimize future technical debt.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the toolkit to outpace any bug and deliver high-velocity, bug-free software to your clients. Stop fighting your code and start building the future of SaaS. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
